pinterest.alt: Looking for trendy spring fashion ideas? This casual and comfy spring outfit is ideal for March street style. Oversized silhouettes are still in, and the combination of baggy light-wash jeans with a colorful statement blouse creates a fun, relaxed look. If you love bold prints and effortless style, this spring outfit idea is for you!
